title: Boy Toys, Air Power Training Ball Game, LED Air Power Football, Football Gifts for Boys & Kids Ages 3-12
features: Be easy to use：be like real soccer !A powerful fan floats allows it to glide across most flat surfaces, like hard wood floor,tiles,carpet.Be a good parent-kid interaction toy as you can play with kids together.Provide time for enjoyment and exercise for all ages.

Attractive Toy: This ball toy is equipped with colored LED lights, which flash colorful lights in the dark. Children can play games at night and have more fun thanks to the variety of colors. The flashing lights add more entertainment to children and let them play a more challenging game in the dark, which will be more exciting and amazing.

Toy dimensions: 18.2 x 18.2 x 7.2 cm, requires 4 AA batteries (not included) - Suitable for children aged 3 years and up. Toy dimensions: 18.2 x 18.2 x 7.2 cm, requires 4 AA batteries (not included) - Suitable for children aged 3 years and up.
Safe Toys: Made of non-toxic plastic. Foam edge, flexible, safe and does not hurt feet. Safe and beautiful enough so that children will not hurt themselves or damage furniture or walls.
Best Gift: Colorful packaging - just the right size. Suitable for indoor or outdoor use, a great toy for your kids to use in multiplayer games. Best choice for kids birthday gifts or Christmas gifts.
